select_when: Retention, alignment, or real understanding depends on people producing the explanation, hypothesis, or plan themselves instead of only hearing it.
A complex or abstract concept will only stick if the learner has to retrieve, articulate, or construct the idea actively.
The team is moving too quickly from borrowed wording to confident action without showing that it can generate the reasoning in its own words.
A decision or teaching path should slow System 1 fluency by forcing structured articulation, explanation, or concept mapping.
avoid_when: Self-generation is being used as an excuse to skip correction, evidence checks, or outside calibration.
The task is so under-scaffolded that asking for generation first would create noise, confusion, or bluffing instead of real understanding.

curation_notes.summary: Kept the model centered on active retrieval, self-produced explanation, and anti-passive-learning discipline rather than on broad creativity rhetoric.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor ideation or workshop sprawl because the raw source is already strongest on active generation as a memory and understanding mechanism.
open_questions: The model also supports communication design, but the Wave 1 surface is clearest when it stays focused on active production of understanding.

select_when.note: The raw source explicitly says generation is strongest when understanding depends on people producing the explanation themselves, especially under complexity and abstraction.

avoid_when.note: The danger line about generation replacing correction or evidence checks is explicit in the source.

input_type.note: The source is explicit about passive receipt versus active generation, while the machine-usable label is reviewed normalization.

output_type.note: The raw source produces explanation, hypothesis, and concept-map generation; the output type compresses those into a reusable intervention label.

reasoning_types.note: The model links reflective articulation to clearer causal understanding, but the taxonomy labels remain reviewed normalization.
